creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-08-13 16:38:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/roundcube-groupvice Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    mail/roundcube-groupvice/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  GroupVice - theme for RoundCube Web Mail, the opensource PHP/MySQL web mail
  application.
  
  This theme is based on Novell Groupwise WebAccess v7 and is known to be
  compatible with IE7, IE8, Safari, Opera, and Firefox.  Features:
  
  WWW: http://www.roundcubeforum.net
  
  PR:             ports/137249
  Submitted by:   Alexey V. Degtyarev
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.966     +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +39 -0     ports/mail/roundcube-groupvice/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/roundcube-groupvice/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/mail/roundcube-groupvice/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/mail/roundcube-groupvice/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +206 -0    ports/mail/roundcube-groupvice/pkg-plist (new)
